## Summary

<!-- Briefly describe what this pull request changes and why. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Typo / formatting / link correction
- [ ] Citation fix
- [ ] Documentation or governance
- [ ] Review note / open question
- [ ] Proposed canon or module change (requires scientific review)

## Scope confirmations

- [ ] No tool, product, or MCP infrastructure was added (no apps, validators,
      schemas, agents, MCP servers, or prompts-as-code).
- [ ] No private or sensitive material was added (no secrets, private links,
      funder/HR/legal/board-sensitive material).
- [ ] No full source documents were copied (no PDFs, DOCX, manuscripts, or long
      source texts — registry metadata, citations, and short excerpts only).
- [ ] No WFF scientific definitions were changed, **unless** this PR is
      explicitly marked for scientific review below.

## Scientific content

- [ ] This PR changes one or more files under `canon/`, `modules/`,
      `glossary/`, `sources/`, `review/`, or `examples/`.
- [ ] This PR requires explicit human **scientific review**.
- [ ] Cumulative Pain and Cumulative Pleasure remain **disaggregated** by
      valence and intensity category as primary WFF outputs (no single
      netted/weighted score introduced as a primary output).

## Source / canon conflicts

- [ ] No source/canon conflict was found in this change.
- [ ] A source/canon conflict was found. If so, I have either updated
      `review/source_conflicts.md` with an auditable entry, **or** this PR stops
      for human review rather than resolving the conflict silently.
